title: Composition Render API
deviation_notes: The invalid-spec route test initially asserted the version message for a body that failed earlier at the missing-keys check; the fixture was corrected to carry all required keys so the intended validation stage is exercised. Route handler is covered by node-level mock req/res tests plus a live curl smoke (SVG, PNG, 400, 405) rather than an HTTP-level test harness. atlas-phaser.json key order was preserved by hand after regeneration to keep the diff signal-only.
